intended_use: qXR-CTR is a deep-learning based software for use by hospitals and clinics for automated assessment of the CTR on chest X-ray (CXRs) scans. qXR-CTR is designed to measure the ratio of the maximal tran
intended_use_full: qXR-CTR is a deep-learning based software for use by hospitals and clinics for automated assessment of the CTR on chest X-ray (CXRs) scans. qXR-CTR is designed to measure the ratio of the maximal transverse diameter of the heart (CD) and the maximal inner transverse diameter (TD) of the thoracic cavity and calculate the CTR value on posterior-anterior view chest view using an artificial intelligence algorithm.
target_condition: Cardiothoracic ratio assessment on chest radiographs
ground_truth: Ground truth established by 3 ABR (American Board of Radiology) thoracic radiologists with a minimum of 10 years of experience
other_metrics: RMSE for cardiac diameter: 7.55 (6.96, 8.38) mm; RMSE for thoracic diameter: 5.43 (4.94, 6.09) mm; RMSE for CTR: 0.03 (0.02, 0.03); Mean Absolute Error for cardiac diameter: 5.66 (5.0) mm; Mean Absolute Error for thoracic diameter: 4.04 (3.63) mm; Mean Absolute Error for CTR: 0.02 (0.02)
